title: IDS Jaipur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Accounts Executive, Driver and More Posts
short_info: Institute of Development Studies Jaipur (IDS Jaipur) Non-Faculty Positions Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.idsj.org. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the IDS Jaipur Non-Faculty Positions Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 18 years and 40 years who have minimum 12th pass qualification and other post-wise required qualifications are eligible to apply for these Non-Faculty Positions vacancies. The offline application process for IDS Jaipur Non-Faculty Positions Recruitment 2026 has started and the application form must reach the institute o

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation will be applicable as per Rajasthan state government norms and IDSJ GB decision.

qualification.education_qualification: Qualifications vary by post, including Contractual and Permanent roles. Minimum 12th pass.
qualification.details: Minimum qualification is 12th pass. Specific qualifications may vary by post.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IDS Jaipur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.idsj.org/vacancies.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IDS Jaipur Non-Faculty Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the IDS Jaipur Non-Faculty Positions is 30 May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How can I apply for the IDS Jaipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. You need to download the application form from the official website, fill it out, and send it along with self-attested copies of certificates via speed post or registered post to the given address.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for the Non-Faculty Positions at IDS Jaipur is 12th pass. However, specific qualifications may vary for individual posts, so it's advisable to check the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The age limit for applicants ranges from a minimum of 18 years to a maximum of 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for Non-Faculty Positions announced by the Institute of Development Studies, Jaipur.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered for these positions ranges from Rs. 5200 to Rs. 20200 Per Month, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for IDS Jaipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for the IDS Jaipur Recruitment 2026. Candidates are advised to check the detailed advertisement for confirmation.

faq.question: Q8. What are the different posts available under Non-Faculty Positions?
faq.answer: The Non-Faculty Positions include Accounts Executive, Junior Office Assistant (two posts), Driver, and Class IV.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Institute of Development Studies, Jaipur, at www.idsj.org/vacancies.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I attach with the application form?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of your certificates, identity proof, and any other relevant documents as mentioned in the official notification along with the filled application form.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the IDS Jaipur Non-Faculty Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the IDS Jaipur Non-Faculty Positions is 30 May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.
